events.text: By the start of our next shift, Rhea had completely stabilized and was safely in recovery from her procedure.[br6.976][br7.547]Vic and I checked in with Rhea's primary care provider to confirm[br11.228][br11.309]that it was time to administer another dose of insulin.[br14.279][br14.36]Then, Vic prepared the insulin, and I was there with him to make sure it was the correct amount.[br19.397]
